meta.purpose: Warn-only calibration benchmark for the PMA STR seasonal-share discount (#1171).
meta.method_note: Licensed STR counts are not ACS vacant-for-rent units. They use different universes and dates; compare only for order-of-magnitude calibration. License counts are advisory only and are never scoring inputs.
meta.source_rules: Each row was queried from an official municipal/county ArcGIS or open-data endpoint on 2026-07-14. Absent jurisdictions are preferable to unverifiable or remembered counts.

entries.source_note: City and County of Denver table 'Short Term Rental-Licenses Active or Pending Renewal'; query returned count 2386.
City of Manitou Springs service 'Short Term Rentals' / 'Active Short Term Rentals'; query returned count 51.
Town of Lyons service 'Licensed Short Term Rentals'; query returned count 16.
Lake County, Colorado GIS service 'Compliant STR 2024'; query returned count 132.
Clear Creek County STR license parcel service; distinct active licenseNumber query returned 154 features.
